raw:
{
  "verses": [
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Jo mannas Azzis irr us
wiſſeem winnu Zelſeeim/ manna
Breeſcha tee ne irr apſlehpti/
neds winnu Noseegums apflahte
preekſch mannahm Azzim.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Bet pirmak atmaktaſchu
es winnu Noseegimus/ un win-
nu Grehkus diwkabrtigi/ tapehz
ka tee mannu Semmi irr ſagah-
niſchi/ tee irr mannu eemanto-
jann Tcefin ar tahm uomirru-
ſchahm Mectahm winnu Elka-
drewbas/ un winnu Neganti-
bas ſagahniſchi.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ak KUNGS! tu eſt
mans Spehks/ un mans Stip-
rums/ un mans Patwerums Grehku
deht/ wiſſas taw
Behdu Deena. Pee tewim nahke
Rohbeſchäs.
tee Pagari no Semmes Gal-
leem un taazzihs: Teefcam/ mub-
fn Techwi irr nepateefsus/ un ne-
lctus Deervektus veeturrejſchi/
pee ka tomehr neneeka bija/ kas
palihdſeht warreja.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Buhs tad weenam Zil-
wekan ſew Deetwas darriht /
kas Deevi ne irraid?
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tadeht reds/ es darri-
schu teem ſchin brthſcham fin-
vatnu/ es darrifchu teem finna-
mn fawu Rohku un fawu War-
ru/ un teems buhs atſiht/ ko
mans Wahrdz irr KUNGS.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 1,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ee Grehki Juhda irr
ſtiti ar Dſelsee Na-
uma/ ar Demantes Af-
ni/ tee irr uhs winnu Si-
Galdn/ un us jubfu Alt-
Raggeem eerakſtiti.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 2,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ka winnu Behrni p
minn ſawus Altarns/ un ſaw
Elkadeewigus Meschus/ pee ſ-
teem Kohſeem/ us augſteem P-
kalneem.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 3,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Bet es nodohſchu man-
Kalnu ar to Tihrumu / ta-
Padohmu / un wiſſas taw-
Mantas par Laupijumu / lih-
ar taweem Augſtuuneem /
Grehku deht/ wiſſas taw-
Rohbeſchäs.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 4,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta tapſi tu zaar taw-
paschu Wainu no tawa Ibp-
ſchuma iſdihts/ ko es tew dew-
biju. Un es likſchu tew tawe-
Eenatdueekern kalpoht kahd-
Semme/ ko tu ne paſiſti / j-
juhs eſat weenu Ugguni rede-
dſinajſchi eekſch mannas Bah-
ſibas/ tas degs muhſchigt.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 5,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta ſakka tas KUNGS
Nolahdehts irr tas Zilweks/ fa-
abs Zilwekeem patanjabs / un-
Meeſu cezelf par fawu Elkunu-
un ka Sirde no ta KUNGS-
atkahpj.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 6,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo tas buhs itt ka Sils-
Tuſſneſi/ un ne redſehs/ tad tas-
Lab.
"
    }
  ],
  "confidence": "high",
  "notes": ""
}
